Prerequisites: Azure CLI authenticated with an active subscription (az login already cached in the sandbox)
Docker daemon running and accessible (docker must connect to /var/run/docker.sock)
Repository already cloned in the working directory

Steps.Description: Create a new azd environment for the project
Set Azure subscription for the azd environment
Steps.Command: bash -lc "azd env set AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID $(az account show --query id -o tsv)"

Steps.Description: Set Azure tenant for the azd environment
Steps.Command: bash -lc "azd env set AZURE_TENANT_ID $(az account show --query tenantId -o tsv)"

Steps.Description: Relocate node_modules to workspace cache and symlink back (safe handling for spaces and path validation)
Steps.Command: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; base=/workspace/.nm-cache; mkdir -p "$base"; find /workspace -maxdepth 5 -name package.json -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -print0 | while IFS= read -r -d "" pj; do d=$(dirname "$pj"); case "$d" in /workspace/*) ;; *) echo "skip non-workspace path: $d"; continue;; esac; rel=${d#/workspace/}; [ -z "$rel" ] && rel=root; slug=$(printf "%s" "$rel" | tr "/ " "__"); tgt="$base/nm-$slug"; mkdir -p "$tgt"; rm -rf "$d/node_modules"; ln -sfn "$tgt" "$d/node_modules"; echo "  -> $d/node_modules -> $tgt"; done'

Steps.Description: Ensure Docker build contexts ignore node_modules to avoid COPY conflicts with npm install layers
Steps.Command: bash -lc 'set -e; find /workspace -name Dockerfile | while read df; do dir=$(dirname "$df"); f="$dir/.dockerignore"; [ -f "$f" ] || printf "" >> "$f"; grep -qx "node_modules" "$f" || printf "\nnode_modules\n" >> "$f"; done'

Steps.Description: Provision Azure resources first so the Container Registry exists and AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME is populated
Build ui-angular image in ACR with a safer registry lookup (fallback to global ACR query when env var is empty)
Steps.Command: bash -lc "cd /workspace/packages/ui-angular; REG=$(azd env get-values | sed -n 's/^AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME=//p' | tr -d '\"'); if [ -z \"$REG\" ]; then REG=$(az acr list --query '[0].name' -o tsv); fi; if [ -z \"$REG\" ]; then echo 'ACR registry name could not be determined'; exit 1; fi; az acr build --registry $REG --image ui-angular:azd-$(date +%s) --file Dockerfile . --no-logs"

Steps.Description: Update the ui-angular Container App to use the newly built image
Steps.Command: bash -lc "REG=$(azd env get-values | grep AZURE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY_NAME | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '\"'); RG=$(azd env get-values | grep AZURE_RESOURCE_GROUP | cut -d= -f2 | tr -d '\"'); TAG=$(az acr repository show-tags -n $REG --repository ui-angular --orderby time_desc --top 1 -o tsv); LOGIN=$(az acr show -n $REG --query loginServer -o tsv); az containerapp update -n ui-angular -g $RG --image $LOGIN/ui-angular:$TAG"

Steps.Description: Provision Azure resources and deploy all services with Azure Developer CLI
Ensure container images are built and pushed (azd deploy – idempotent verification after azd up)

VerifyHints: source: inferred from azure.yaml and infra/*.bicep (Azure Container Apps via azd)
